name: Family Time
text: Give to the Sue Storm player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: â€¢ Exhaust Sue Storm â†’ remove Family Time from the game. â€¢ Discard a card from your hand â†’ discard this obligation.

flavor: "Did you think I wear this armor merely for show?"
name: Psycho-Man
text: Forced Response: After Psycho-Man activates, discard 4 cards from the encounter deck. If any Invisible Woman Nemesis cards were discarded this way, reveal them instead.

flavor: Psycho-Man's manipulating your will!
name: Emotional Masterplan
text: Heroes cannot change form. Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand â†’ treat the printed text box of this card as if it were blank until the end of your turn.

flavor: "You will fear the Microverse!" â€”Psycho-Man
name: Microversal Maneuvers
text: Attach to Psycho-Man. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Forced Response: After Psycho-Man schemes against you, take 1 indirect damage. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "Is your spirit broken yet? It soon will be." â€”Psycho-Man
name: Titanic Terror
text: Attach to Psycho-Man. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Forced Response: After Psycho-Man attacks, place 1 threat on the main scheme. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "I will tear through your minds until you BEG me to stop. Then everyone can fear the Psycho-Man." â€”Psycho-Man
name: End Of The Line
text: When Revealed: Discard the top 8 cards from the encounter deck. If Microversal Maneuvers or Titanic Terror are discarded this way, reveal them.

name: Ben's Cure
text: Give to the Reed Richards player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: â€¢ Exhaust Reed Richards and discard a card with a printed [mental] resource â†’ remove Ben's Cure from the game. â€¢ Take 1 damage and place 1 threat on the main scheme â†’ discard this obligation.

flavor: "I possess the greatest weapon of all -- the world's greatest brain!!"
name: Wizard
text: Each hero gets -1 THW.

flavor: Wizard has a nefarious plot in mind.
name: Hubris
text: When Revealed: Place X additional threat here, where X is the combined THW of all heroes.

flavor: "As is your nature, clod... you look, but you do not see... the FULL picture." â€”Wizard
name: Projection
text: Incite 1. Surge. Attach to your identity card. [star] Boost: Attach to your identity card.

name: Execution
text: When Revealed: Discard each Projection attachment in play. For each attachment discarded this way, each player must choose to either discard 2 cards from their hand or take 2 indirect damage. If no Projection attachments were discarded this way, shuffle Execution back into the encounter deck and this card gains surge.

name: Flame Off
text: Give to the Johnny Storm player. Flip to alter-ego form and remove all flame counters from enemies in play. Then: â€¢ If up to 3 counters were removed this way, discard this obligation. â€¢ If 4 or more flame counters were removed this way, remove Flame Off from the game.

flavor: "Hey, Hot Head! Tell me, how tough are your lungs?"
name: Hydro-Man
text: Hydro-Man cannot have flame counters placed on him. [star] Boost: Put Hydro-Man into play engaged with you.

flavor: Hydro-Man has appeared and extinguished all the flames!
name: Dam It
text: When Revealed: Remove all flame counters from enemies in play. Then, place 1 additional threat here for each flame counter removed this way.

flavor: "Can you dodge a tidal wave, tough guy?" â€”Hydro-Man
name: Tidal Surge
text: Surge. When Revealed: If Hydro-Man is in play, each player must choose to either exhaust their identity or take 3 indirect damage.

name: Annual Shedding
text: Give to the Ben Grimm player. Flip to alter-ego form. Choose one: â€¢ Discard a tough status card from Ben Grimm â†’ discard this obligation. â€¢ Stun or confuse Ben Grimm â†’ discard this obligation.

name: Puppet Master
text: Puppet Master cannot be attacked while Hulk is in play. Forced Response: After Puppet Master is revealed, search the encounter deck for Hulk and reveal him.

flavor: Ben Grimm's unwilling stepfather-in-law has taken control of the Incredible Hulk!
name: Pulling The Strings
text: The minion in play with the lowest SCH gets +1 ATK and +1 SCH.

flavor: "Fight me, Thing!"
name: Hulk
text:
Guard.
[star] Hulk's attacks gain piercing and overkill.

flavor: "You've hurt me like no one ever has, Benjamin. And tonight, I'll kill you." â€”Puppet Master
name: Friendly Fire
text: When Revealed: You take X damage, where X is the ATK of the friendly character with the highest ATK. If your identity is the only friendly character in play, this card gains surge.

flavor: "I am Namor the First, King of Atlantis, Lord of the Seven Seas and Supreme Commander of the Undersea Legions."
name: Namor
text: Deep: Namor gets +1 SCH and +1 ATK. Forced Interrupt: When a minion activates, discard the top card of the encounter deck unless Namor is Deep.

flavor: "I am warning you all."
name: Namor
text: When Revealed: Summon the Neptune's Trident attachment and reveal it. Deep: Namor gets +1 SCH and +1 ATK. Forced Interrupt: When a minion activates, discard the top card of the encounter deck unless Namor is Deep.

flavor: "Stay the hell out of my oceans."
name: Namor
text: Deep: Namor gets +1 SCH and +2 ATK. Forced Interrupt: When a minion activates, discard the top card of the encounter deck unless Namor is Deep.

name: The Briny Deep
text:
While there are 15 or fewer cards remaining in the encounter deck, Namor is Deep, and "Deep" abilities on Namor and encounter cards must be resolved.
When this scheme is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: Namor the King of Atlantis is invading the surface!
name: The Briny Deep
text: Contents: Namor (I) and Namor (II) (Namor (II) and Namor (III) instead for expert.) Namor, Atlantean Wilds, and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Experimental Weapons). Setup: Count from the bottom of the encounter deck and place the Deep reminder card above the fifteenth card (without looking). It has no in game effects, and is only to indicate when Namor is Deep. If the encounter deck is ever shuffled, re-place the Deep reminder card above the fifteenth card from the bottom again. Advance to 1B.

name: Atlantean Skin
text: Deep: Give Namor a tough status card. When Revealed: Heal 3 damage from Namor. If 3 damage was not healed this way, this card gains surge. [star] Boost: Heal 3 damage from Namor.

flavor: "You DARE show your face under the sea?" â€”Namor
name: Furious Strike
text: Deep: Surge. When Revealed: Choose to either take 2 indirect damage or discard 2 cards from your hand and 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck.

name: Imperius Rex!
text: Deep: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When Namor activates, give him 1 additional boost card. Then, unless Namor is Deep, discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. * Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "I have one demand for your masters. And there will be no negotiation." -Namor
name: Royal Authority
text: When Revealed: Place 2 threat on the main scheme (on each scheme instead if Namor is [[Deep]].)

name: Wrath Of The Sea
text: When Revealed: Discarding 1 at a time, discard a total of 2 cards (4 cards instead if Namor is [[Deep]]) from the top of the encounter deck and your hand divided as you choose. Then, your hero takes X indirect damage, where X is equal to the number of boost icons on cards discarded this way.

flavor: "Atlantis has no friends from the surface." â€”Namor
name: Atlantis
text: Deep: This card gains [hazard]. Forced Interrupt: When Namor attacks, give him 1 additional boost card. Hero Action: Each hero discards 2 cards from hand â†’ discard this card.

name: Ankle Wings
text: Attach to Namor. Deep: This card gains [amplify]. [acceleration] Hero Action: Give Namor a facedown boost card and deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card -> discard this card.

name: Neptune's Trident
text: Attach to Namor. Namor gains retaliate 1 (retaliate 2 instead if Namor is [[Deep]]). Forced Interrupt: When Namor attacks with 3 or more boost cards, discard Neptune's Trident â†’ that attack gains ranged.

flavor: "War Sharks. Finish them." -Namor
name: War Sharks
text:
Patrol.
While there are 15 or fewer cards remaining in the encounter deck, this card gains Quickstrike.
[star] War Sharks' attacks gain piercing.

name: Piranha Guards
text:
Guard.
While there are 15 or fewer cards remaining in the encounter deck, this card gains Quickstrike.
[star] Piranha Guards' attacks gain piercing.

name: Octopus Warrior
text: Quickstrike. Forced Response: After Octopus Warrior defeats an ally, discard the top 8 cards of the encounter deck unless there are 15 or fewer cards remaining in the encounter deck.

flavor: "Behold, the great whale Giganto! A monstrous creature spawned by the very poison that you have so recklessly discarded into the waters of the world!" -Namor
name: Giganto
text: While there are 15 or fewer cards remaining in the encounter deck, Giganto's attacks gain overkill.

flavor: "If you come at me, I will come back at you with everything we have!" â€”Mole Man
name: Mole Man
text: Radar Sense â€” Forced Interrupt: When you make an attack against Mole Man, dig 2 (discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck). Reduce the damage that attack deals by 1 for each star icon ([star]) discarded this way.

flavor: "I'm done warning you people!"â€”Mole Man
name: Mole Man
text: Radar Sense â€” Forced Interrupt: When you make an attack against Mole Man, dig 3 (discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck). Reduce the damage that attack deals by 1 for each star icon ([star]) discarded this way.

flavor: "Subterraneans, FORWARD!" â€”Mole Man
name: Mole Man
text: Radar Sense â€” Forced Interrupt: When you make an attack against Mole Man, dig 4 (discard the top 4 cards of the encounter deck). Reduce the damage that attack deals by 1 for each star icon [star] discarded this way.

name: Amassing The Moloids
text: Forced Interrupt: When a [[SUBTERRANEAN]] minion is discarded while resolving the dig keyword, place a Moloid counter on the Subterranean Exit environment with the fewest Moloid counters (first player decides ties.) If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: The insidious Mole Man has been responsible for attacks coming from the depths below. Stop him and the gargantuan Giganto before it's too late!
name: Amassing The Moloids
text: Contents: Mole Man (I) and Mole Man (II). (Mole Man (II) and Mole Man (III) instead for Expert mode.) Mole Man and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: State of Emergency). Setup: Advance to stage 1B.

name: Monster Isle
text: Permanent. Setup. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero -> move X Moloid counters from 1 copy of Subterranean Exit to other environments in play (including this one) divided as you choose, where X is equal to your ATK. If there are 4 copies of Giganto in the victory display, the players win the game.

flavor: After tasting a temporary defeat, Giganto is unpredictable and deadset on vengeance!
name: Vicious!
text:
Permanent.
Giganto gets +3[per_hero] hit points and gains villainous.

flavor: Moloids congregate around those they find powerful. Control their numbers, or we'll have a bigger problem.
name: Subterranean Exit
text: Permanent. Setup. Forced Interrupt: When a fifth Moloid counter would be placed here, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Giganto and reveal it instead. Then, place 1 [per_hero] threat on the main scheme.

flavor: Displeased with his previous licking from a direct approach, Giganto decides on a stealthier approach, with a suddenness and surreptitiousness that is surprising for a behemoth of his stature!
name: Quickened!
text:
Permanent.
Giganto gets +3[per_hero] hit points and +1 SCH and gains quickstrike.

flavor: Moloids congregate around those they find powerful. Control their numbers, or we'll have a bigger problem.
name: Subterranean Exit
text: Permanent. Setup. Forced Interrupt: When a fifth Moloid counter would be placed here, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Giganto and reveal it instead. Then, place 1 [per_hero] threat on the main scheme.

flavor: Mole Man calls Giganto back to him for protection. It's going to be tough to reach Mole Man without forcing Giganto to retreat first.
name: Protective!
text:
Permanent.
Giganto gets +3[per_hero] hit points and gains guard.

flavor: Moloids congregate around those they find powerful. Control their numbers, or we'll have a bigger problem.
name: Subterranean Exit
text: Permanent. Setup. Forced Interrupt: When a fifth Moloid counter would be placed here, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Giganto and reveal it instead. Then, place 1 [per_hero] threat on the main scheme.

flavor:
"I get it, big guy. Honest. Sorry it's come to this."
-Simon Williams
name: Enraged!
text:
Permanent.
Giganto gets +3[per_hero] hit points and +1 ATK and his attacks gain piercing.

flavor: Moloids congregate around those they find powerful. Control their numbers, or we'll have a bigger problem.
name: Subterranean Exit
text: Permanent. Setup. Forced Interrupt: When a fifth Moloid counter would be placed here, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Giganto and reveal it instead. Then, place 1 [per_hero] threat on the main scheme.

name: Cover Of Darkness
text: Attach to Mole Man. Forced Interrupt: When you would dig for any amount, increase that amount by 2. Hero Response: After you remove a copy of Giganto from the game, discard this card. [star] Boost: Dig 2.

name: Mole Man's Stave
text: Attach to Mole Man. Forced Response: After Mole Man attacks and damages your hero, dig 1. Hero Action: Spend [energy] [physical] resources -> discard this attachment. * Boost: Dig 3.

name: Mole Man's Visor
text: Attach to Mole Man. Forced Response: After your hero deals damage to Mole Man, choose to either take 1 damage or dig 2. Hero Response: After you move 2 or more Moloid counters from a copy of Subterranean Exit this turn, discard this attachment.

name: Giganto
text: Victory 1. This card cannot enter play unless it is revealed. When Revealed: Flip a Subterranean Exit environment with 4 Moloid counters on it (max once per phase). If you cannot, discard this card and dig 4. [star] Boost: Reveal this minion.

name: Giganto
text: Victory 1. This card cannot enter play unless it is revealed. When Revealed: Flip a Subterranean Exit environment with 4 Moloid counters on it (max once per phase). If you cannot, discard this card and dig 4. [star] Boost: Reveal this minion.

name: Giganto
text: Victory 1. This card cannot enter play unless it is revealed. When Revealed: Flip a Subterranean Exit environment with 4 Moloid counters on it (max once per phase). If you cannot, discard this card and dig 4. [star] Boost: Reveal this minion.

name: Giganto
text: Victory 1. This card cannot enter play unless it is revealed. When Revealed: Flip a Subterranean Exit environment with 4 Moloid counters on it (max once per phase). If you cannot, discard this card and dig 4. [star] Boost: Reveal this minion.

name: Moloid Diggers
text: When Revealed: Dig X, where X is the number of [[SUBTERRANEAN]] minions in play. When Defeated: Dig 2. * Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Moloid Gargantuan
text: Retaliate 1. Toughness. Forced Response: After Moloid Gargantuan enters play, dig 1. If a [[SUBTERRANEAN]] minion was discarded this way, Mole Man attacks you.

flavor: "We are on the verge of victory, my Moloids! Stand fast!" â€”Mole Man
name: Moloid Sentry
text: Guard. Patrol. When Defeated: Dig 2. [star] Boost: Dig 2.

name: Subterranean Packbeast
text: [star] When Revealed: Dig 3. Put each Moloid Digger minion discarded this way into play engaged with you. If no minions were put into play this way, Subterranean Packbeast gets +1 ATK and +1 SCH.

flavor: "Go get them, my babies!" â€”Mole Man
name: Tricephalous
text: Tricephalous cannot be defeated until players have made a total of 3 or more attacks against them.

name: Critical Mass
text: Forced Interrupt: When Mole Man activates, if each Subterranean Exit environment has 1 or more Moloid counters on it, give him 1 additional boost card. * Boost: Give Mole Man 1 additional boost card for this activation.

name: Overrun With Moloids!
text: When Revealed: Place 1 [per_hero] additional threat here for each Subterranean Exit environment in play. * Boost: Place 1 threat on the main scheme for each Subterranean Exit in play.

name: Surfacing Moloids
text: When Revealed: Dig 2. Forced Interrupt: When resolving the dig keyword, reveal the first Moloid Digger or Moloid Sentry minion you discard each turn. * Boost: Dig 2.

flavor: "Welcome to MY world!" â€”Mole Man
name: Dark Dealings
text: Peril. (While you are resolving this card, other players cannot help you.) When Revealed: Choose one: â€¢ Dig 3. Dig 2. Dig 1. â€¢ Mole Man schemes. â€¢ Confuse your identity.

name: More Moloids!
text: When Revealed: Place a total of 4 Moloid counters on copies of the Subterranean Exit environment divided as you choose. Then, place X [per_hero] threat on the main scheme, where X is the number of Subterranean Exit environments you placed a counter on this way.

flavor: "The human race is doomed. DOOMED!"
name: Annihilus
text: When Revealed: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. Forced Interrupt: When the player phase begins, if Annihilus has the Cosmic Control Rod attached, place 2 [per_hero] threat on the main scheme.

flavor: "Sssssurprise, Richardsss!"
name: Annihilus
text: When Revealed: Deal 1 damage to each friendly character. Then, resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. When Defeated: Deal each player a facedown encounter card.

flavor: â€œGive me your power. I wish to feast upon it.â€
name: Annihilus
text: When Revealed: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. â˜… Forced Response: After Annihilus deals any amount of damage to a hero, he heals for that amount.

flavor: "I am Annihilus...Lord of the Negative Zone! Annihilus the Living Death That Walks!"
name: Annihilus
text: Retaliate 1. When Revealed: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability.

name: Annihilus
text: When Revealed: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. Forced Response: After you deal damage to Annihilus, choose to either place 1 threat on the main scheme or take 2 damage.

name: Insectoid Ambush!
text: [star] X is equal to the number of villain stages remaining (including the current stage). Hero Interrupt: When a hero uses a basic power to thwart this scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: Annihilus and a small group of his dangerous cohorts have exploited a temporary portal to the Negative Zone in the Baxter Building! now they are congregating and attacking to gain permanent control of the portal!
name: Insectoid Ambush!
text: Contents: Annihilus (II, III, IV). (Annihilus (I, II, III, IV, V) instead for expert mode.) Annihilus and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Baxter Building). Setup: Attach the Cosmic Control Rod attachment to Annihilus. Advance to stage 1B.

flavor: The key to Annihilus' immortality and power.
name: Cosmic Control Rod
text: Attached enemy gets +1 ATK. Attached enemy gains stalwart. Forced Interrupt: When any amount of damage would be dealt to the attached enemy, place it here instead. Then, if there is at least 2 damage here, set this card aside, out of play.

flavor: "Ssssssssummon the horde." â€”Annihilus
name: Cosmic Control
text: Permanent. Setup. Special: Summon The Cosmic Control Rod attachment and attach it to Annihilus. If it is already attached to him, deal each player in hero form a facedown encounter card.

flavor: "Yessss. Thisss will do." -Annihilus
name: Evolved Carapace
text: Attach to Annihilus. Annihilus gets +8 hit points and gains steady. Hero Response: After Annihilus is stunned or confused, discard this card.

name: Evolved Cognition
text: Attach to Annihilus. Forced Response: After Annihilus schemes, resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. Hero Response: After Annihilus takes 5 or more damage from an attack, discard this card.

flavor: Admiral of the Harvester of Sorrows, Salo is responsible for the genocide of more than two entire star systems.
name: Admiral Salo
text: [star] Admiral Salo's starting hit points are equal to Annihilus' stage number.

flavor: "No one gives me commands!"â€”Blastaar
name: Blastaar
text: Forced Response: After Blastaar enters play, summon the Cosmic Control Rod attachment and attach it to him. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: Conduits of the Opposing Force, Currs attach to Seekers with glowing umbilical cords.
name: Curr
text:
Incite 1. Toughness.
[star] Boost: Give Annihilus a tough status card.

flavor: Self-proclaimed most-beloved queen of Annihilus.
name: Eradica
text: Guard. Patrol. When Defeated: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "It will take greater effort than this to take me down."
name: Ravenous
text: [star] Ravenous' ATK is equal to Annihilus' stage number. When Revealed: Summon a Curr minion and put it into play engaged with you.

flavor: "I don't suppose you'll just surrender." -Ravenous
name: Seeker
text: Seeker cannot be defeated while a Curr minion is in play. When Revealed: Summon a Curr minion and put it into play engaged with you.

name: Evolved Blasting
text:
While the Cosmic Control Rod is attached to Annihilus, his attacks gain piercing and ranged.
[hazard]
* Boost: This card gains boost icons equal to Annihilus' stage number.

flavor: While the Cosmic Control Rod is attached to Annihilus, he gets +1 SCH.
name: Evolved Tactics
text: When Revealed: Place X [per_hero] additional threat here, where X is Annihilus' stage number. * Boost: This card gains boost icons equal to Annihilus' stage number.

name: Self-preservation
text: When Revealed: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. When Defeated: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. [hazard]

flavor:
"I cannot die! Nothing ssstoppss Annihilusss!"
-Annihilus
name: Desperate Regeneration
text: When Revealed: Heal X damage from Annihilus, where X is his stage number. If 2 or less damage was healed this way, resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability.

name: Muster Forces
text: When Revealed: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability. Then, place 1 threat on the main scheme for each facedown encounter card in play. [star] Boost: Resolve the Cosmic Control environment's "Special" ability.

name: Opposing Force
text: When Revealed: Choose X of the following, where X is Annihilus' stage number (you may choose the same option more than once): â€¢ Take 2 indirect damage. â€¢ Place 1 [per_hero] threat on the main scheme. â€¢ Spend 1 resource.

flavor: "We upgraded our panic floor."â€”Reed Richards
name: The Omega Room
text: Permanent. Setup. Interrupt: When Annihilus initiates an activation against you, choose any number of facedown encounter cards in front of you to keep or give to him as facedown boost cards.

name: Stolen Displacer Unit
text: Attach to the villain. Forced Response: After attached villain activates, discard X cards from the top of the encounter deck, where X is the number of attachments in play. Interrupt: When an acceleration token is placed on the main scheme, discard this card.

name: Stolen Proto Spectrolyzer
text: Attach to the villain. Forced Interrupt: When the villain activates, give it 1 additional boost card. Then, look at each of the villain's facedown boost cards and discard the card with the fewest boost icons. Hero Interrupt: When attached villain would take 4 or more damage from a single attack, discard this card instead.

name: Stolen Unstable Molecules
text: Attach to the enemy with the highest SCH. Reduce the amount of damage attached character takes from each attack by 2. Hero Action: Give your hero a tough status card. Then, stun and confuse your hero -> discard this card.

flavor: The Baxter Building, home to the Fantastic Four, is being infiltrated and pillaged by villainous forces!
name: Compromised Baxter Building
text: Forced Response: After an attachment is revealed, choose one: â€¢ Place 1 threat on the main scheme. â€¢ Place 3 threat on the main scheme and discard this card.

name: Hacked Security Drone
text: Hacked Security Drone cannot defend. When Revealed: Name 2 card types, then discard the top 4 cards of your deck. If each of the named types are discarded this way, put Hacked Security Drone into play as an ally under your control. [star] Forced Response: After Hacked Security Drone attacks, discard it.

flavor: The villain is taking things from the Baxter Building and breaking out!
name: Takin' & Breakin'
text: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an attachment is discarded and reveal that attachment. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Super-skrull
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull activates, if he has an attachment with the: - [[FIRE]] or [[STONE]] trait, he gets +1 ATK for that activation. - [[INVISIBILITY]] or [[SHAPESHIFTING]] trait, he gets +1 SCH for that activation.

name: Super-skrull
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull activates, if he has an attachment with the: â€¢ [[FIRE]] or [[STONE]] trait, he gets +1 ATK for that activation. â€¢ [[INVISIBILITY]] or [[SHAPESHIFTING]] trait, he gets +1 SCH for that activation.

name: Super-skrull
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull activates, if he has an attachment with the: â€¢ [[FIRE]] or [[STONE]] trait, he gets +1 ATK for that activation. â€¢ [[INVISIBILITY]] or [[SHAPESHIFTING]] trait, he gets +1 SCH for that activation. When Revealed: Reveal the top card of the Stabilized Powers deck.

flavor: Oh no! He's starting to regain permanent control over the powers we were suppressing!
name: Enraged Escapee
text: When Revealed: Reveal the top card of the Stabilized Powers deck. When Completed: Reveal the top card of the Stabilized Powers deck.

flavor: Super-Skrull has escaped from the Baxter Building and hailed his allies to come to his aid. We were suppressing his abilities, but he's regaining control of them.
name: Enraged Escapee
text: Contents: Super-Skrull (I) and Super-Skrull (II). (Super-Skrull (II) and Super-Skrull (III) for expert.) Super-Skrull and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Experimental Weapons). Setup: Set aside the four environment cards from the Super-Skrull encounter set to create the Stabilized Powers deck and put it next to the main scheme. Advance to stage 1B.

name: Partial Powers
text: When Completed: Reveal the top card of the Stabilized Powers deck.

flavor: Super-Skrull's angry, and he's already regained full control over half his powers. Keep him distracted!
name: Partial Powers
text: Advance to stage 2B.

name: Now Or Never
text: If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: He's nearly regained control over all his powers! Take him out before he obliterates us all!
name: Now Or Never
text: Advance to stage 3B.

name: Force Fields
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull attacks you, only your hero can defend against that attack. Hero Action: Spend [physical] & [mental] resources â†’ discard this card.

name: Built To Clobber
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull attacks, that attack gains overkill. Hero Action: Spend [energy] [physical] resources â†’ discard this card. * Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Fantastic Flexibility
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull schemes, place 1 additional threat on each side scheme. Hero Action: Spend [energy] & [mental] resources â†’ discard this card. * Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Flame Thrower
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. [star] Forced Response: After Super-Skrull damages your hero, discard a card from your hand or take 1 additional damage. Hero Action: Spend [mental] [mental] resources â†’ discard this card.

name: Vanishing Veneer
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. Treat each minion as if they have the guard keyword. Hero Action: Spend [energy] [energy] resources â†’ discard this card. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Hard Drive
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. Forced Response: After your turn ends, give Super-Skrull a tough status card. If Super-Skrull is already tough, heal 1 damage from him instead. Hero Action: Spend [energy] [wild] resources -> discard this card. * Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Adaptive Agility
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. Forced Interrupt: When Super-Skrull would take damage, reduce that damage by 1. Hero Action: Spend [wild] [wild] resources â†’ discard this card. â˜… Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Scorching Skin
text: Attach to Super-Skrull. Forced Interrupt: Super-Skrull gains retaliate 1. Hero Action: Spend [energy] [wild] resources â†’ discard this card. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Invisibility Stabilizing
text: [[INVISIBILITY]] attachments cannot be discarded. When Revealed: Discard 5 cards from the encounter deck. If an [[INVISIBILITY]] attachment was discarded in this way, reveal it.

name: Stone Stabilizing
text: [[STONE]] attachments cannot be discarded. When Revealed: Discard 5 cards from the encounter deck. If a [[STONE]] attachment was discarded in this way, reveal it.

name: Shapeshifting Stabilizing
text: [[SHAPESHIFTING]] attachments cannot be discarded. When Revealed: Discard 5 cards from the encounter deck. If a [[SHAPESHIFTING]] attachment was discarded in this way, reveal it.

name: Fire Stabilizing
text: [[FIRE]] attachments cannot be discarded. When Revealed: Discard 5 cards from the encounter deck. If a [[FIRE]] attachment was discarded in this way, reveal it.

flavor: "Super-Skrull! This is amazing!"
name: R'kin
text: When Defeated: Super-Skrull attacks the player who defeated R'kin.

flavor: "Master...Kl'rt...we are now your family. Your people."
name: Praxagora
text: Forced Response: After Praxagora activates, discard 3 cards from the encounter deck. If an attachment is discarded this way, reveal it.

flavor: "Let's fight."
name: Preak
text: [star] Preak attacks once for each clone counter here. Forced Response: After Preak takes damage, place a clone counter here.

flavor: "Our scientists can help you, my liege."
name: Skrull Aerialist
text: Forced Response: After Skrull Aerialist schemes, discard a card from the encounter deck. If an attachment is discarded this way, reveal it.

flavor: "You may be packing heat, Sir, but so are we!"
name: Skrull Soldier
text:
Incite 1.
[star] Skrull Soldier's attacks gain piercing and ranged.

name: Invisible Suckerpunch
text: When Revealed: Deal 3 damage to your identity. If you would be defeated this way, you may discard your hand and exhaust your identity instead.

name: Stone Strength
text: When Revealed: Super-Skrull attacks you. This attack gains overkill.

name: Stretchy Strike
text: When Revealed: Deal 1 damage to each identity. Then, place 1 threat on each scheme in play. If there are no side schemes in play, place 2 threat on the main scheme instead.

name: Fiery Fists
text: When Revealed: Choose 3 of the following (you may choose the same option multiple times): â€¢ Deal 1 damage to your identity. â€¢ Discard 1 card from your hand.

flavor: "...Now you don't." -Super-Skrull
name: Stabilized: Invisibility
text: Attachments with the [[INVISIBILITY]] trait cannot be discarded.

flavor: "You'll find I can get a lot more...creative with this than Richards." -Super-Skrull
name: Stabilized: Shapeshifting
text: Attachments with the [[SHAPESHIFTING]] trait cannot be discarded.

flavor: "--time to what? ROCK? That's what you were gonna say, wasn't it? Laaame." --Ms. Marvel
name: Stabilized: Stone
text: Attachments with the STONE trait cannot be discarded.

flavor: "Flame. On."
name: Stabilized: Fire
text: Attachments with the [[FIRE]] trait cannot be discarded.

name: Doctor Doom
text: Forced Response: After Doctor Doom takes 6 or more damage from an attack, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is a: â€¢ Attachment, give Doctor Doom a tough status card. â€¢ Minion, reveal that minion. â€¢ Side Scheme, place 1 threat on the main scheme. â€¢ Treachery, heal 2 damage from Doctor Doom.

name: Doctor Doom
text: Forced Response: After Doctor Doom takes 5 or more damage from an attack, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is a: â€¢ Attachment, give Doctor Doom a tough status card. â€¢ Minion, reveal that minion. â€¢ Side Scheme, place 1 threat on the main scheme. â€¢ Treachery, heal 2 damage from Doctor Doom.

name: Doctor Doom
text: Forced Response: After Doctor Doom takes 4 or more damage from an attack, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is a: â€¢ Attachment, give Doctor Doom a tough status card. â€¢ Minion, reveal that minion. â€¢ Side Scheme, place 1 threat on the main scheme. â€¢ Treachery, heal 2 damage from Doctor Doom.

flavor: Doctor Doom is enacting a multi-faceted scheme to attack earth from multiple fronts and bring about global chaos through interconnected portals!
name: Mystic Portals
text: Contents: Doctor Doom (I) and Doctor Doom (II). (Doctor Doom (II) and Doctor Doom (III) for expert mode.) Doctor Doom and Standard encounter sets. Doombot Factory, Vibranium Heist, Possession, Nuclear Threat, and 5 additional selected modular sets. (See Insert). Setup: Put the Leyline Network environment into play. Set the Demoralized environment and each of the 9 modular sets with their associated main schemes aside. Shuffle each remaining PORTAL environment together to create the PORTAL Deck and place it facedown next to the main scheme.

flavor: Having gained access to a centralized mystic nexus of Leylines, Doctor Doom is trying to open as many simultaneous portals across the world as he can.
name: Mystic Portals
text: Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase ends, place a portal counter here. If there are two or more portal counters here, complete this scheme.

name: Leyline Network
text: When 4 or more [[PORTAL]] environments are in play, the players lose the game. Forced Response: After a main scheme is completed, reveal the top card of the [[PORTAL]] deck.

name: Protection Spell
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When Doctor Doom would take any amount of damage, remove that much threat from here instead. When the villain phase begins, complete the main scheme. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Reflection Spell
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When a tough status card would be given to Doctor Doom while already has a tough status card, deal 1 damage to each friendly character in play instead. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "Your move." â€”Doctor Doom
name: Spiked Armor
text: Attach to Doctor Doom. Doctor Doom gains retaliate 1. Hero Action: Spend [mental] [wild] resources -> discard this card.

flavor: "Your skin rarely feels the sun's warmth, does it, Victor?" â€”Soothsayer
name: Doom's Other Mask
text: Attach to Doctor Doom. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [wild] resources â†’ discard this card.

flavor: "Doom is the master of his passions, never mastered by them. And so, I am protected."â€”Doctor Doom
name: Eldritch Shield
text: When Revealed: Give Doctor Doom a tough status card. If he is already tough, deal 1 damage to each friendly character instead.

flavor: "Your family is doomed, Reed."â€”Doctor Doom
name: Energy Inversion Spell
text: When Revealed: Discard all tough status cards from friendly characters in play. If 1 or more tough status cards were discarded this way, give Doctor Doom a tough status card. If no tough status cards were discarded this way, Doctor Doom attacks you.

flavor:
"Doctor Doom is fighting ME. Which I have to admit is insanely cool... especially if I live to tell the tale."
â€”Wiccan
name: Eldritch Bolts
text: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage. If your identity takes any amount of damage, you are stunned.

name: Doombot
text:
Guard. Toughness. Doombot ignores the piercing keyword.
[star] Doombot's ATK is equal to the number of Doombot minions in play.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: Doom has just opened a permanent portal to his home nation of Latveria. He'll have all the resources he needs to bolster his army of doombots now.
name: Latverian Industriousness
text: When Revealed: Reveal the set-aside Doombot Multiplication side scheme. Then, shuffle the rest of the Doombot Factory modular set into the encounter deck and advance to side B.

flavor: Just as we feared, Doom has upgraded all his Doombots and given them updated tactics on his nefarious plan. Don't let him open another portal!
name: Latverian Industriousness
text: Forced Interrupt: When a [[ROBOT]] minion enters play, place 1 [per_hero] threat here.

flavor:
"This land is DOOM'S--AS IS THE WORLD ENTIRE!"
-Doctor Doom
name: Latveria
text: Minions with the [[ROBOT]] trait get +1 SCH. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Latverian Industriousness A.

flavor: Just received word that Doom is trying to break into Wakanda's primary vibranium vault. If he succeeds, God help us all.
name: Wakanda Infiltration
text: When Completed: If the Vibranium Vault environment is still in play, remove it from the game and flip the Vibranium Stores environment.

flavor: Doom's opened a portal to Wakanda. There's only one thing there that's important enough for him to attempt this--Vibranium.
name: Wakanda Infiltration
text: When Revealed: Reveal the set-aside Vibranium Vault environment. Shuffle the Vibranium Heist modular set into the encounter deck and advance to side B.

flavor: "When Wakanda is an ocean of blood, an answer to open this vault will surface." -Doctor Doom
name: Wakanda
text: Minions with the [[ROBOT]] trait gain Incite 1. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Wakanda Infiltration A.

flavor: We were wrong. Doom's orchestrated the kidnapping of Franklin Richards--Reed and Sue Richards' powerhouse of a son.
name: Go To Hell
text: When Completed: If the Rescue Franklin! side scheme is still in play, remove it and the Franklin Richards ally from the game. Then, put the set-aside Demoralized environment into play.

flavor: Doom has opened a portal to Hell, and made an agreement with 3 powerful demons. There isn't much worse he could do than this!
name: Go To Hell
text: When Revealed: Reveal the set-aside Rescue Franklin! side scheme. Shuffle the Possession modular set into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

flavor: "Choose your words carefully, demon. Victor Von Doom bows before no other." -Doctor Doom
name: Hell
text: Minions with the [[DEMON]] trait gain villainous. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Go to Hell A.

flavor: â€œHAHAHAHAHAHA!â€ â€”Doctor Doom
name: Demoralized
text: CONDITION. Increase the resource cost of THWART events by 1.

flavor: Doombots have painted several world capitals as targets. Disarm them asap!
name: Nuclear Launch
text: When Completed: If any [[CITY]] environments are in play, remove them from the game. Each player removes the top 2 cards of their deck and top 2 cards of their discard pile from the game for each [[CITY]] environment removed this way.

flavor: Doom has opened a portal to a classified nuclear weapons bunker. No city is safe while he has access to these missiles.
name: Nuclear Launch
text: When Revealed: Shuffle the Nuclear Threat modular set into the encounter deck. Then, discard the top card of the encounter deck until a [[CITY]] environment or [[DISARM CODE]] attachment is discarded, then reveal it. Advance to side B.

flavor: "...Holy geez." â€”Ben Grimm
name: Nuclear Facility
text: This card gains 1 acceleration icon ([acceleration]) for each [[CITY]] environment in play. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Nuclear Launch A.

flavor: Word on the street is that Doom has been in talks with one of Spider-Man's rogues gallery and is taking a moment to recover while they distract you!
name: New York Villainy
text: The minion with the most remaining hit points engaged with each player gains villainous.

flavor: Doctor Doom has just opened a portal directly to the streets of New York.
name: New York Villainy
text: Setup: Choose 1 of the following modular sets and set it aside with this main scheme: â€¢ A Mess of things â€¢ Power Drain â€¢ Running Interference When Revealed: Shuffle the selected modular set into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

name: New York
text: When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme New York Villainy A. Then, heal 2 [per_hero] damage from Doctor Doom for each [[PORTAL]] environment in play. Hero Action: Spend [wild] [wild] resources -> discard this card.

flavor: Our intelligence on this portal's location must be wrong. Doom would never...
name: Unleash Hydra
text: Setup: Choose 1 of the following modular sets and set it aside with this main scheme: â€¢ Hydra Assault â€¢ Hydra Patrol â€¢ Legions of Hydra When Revealed: Shuffle the selected modular set into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

flavor: Doom is completely unpredictable! He has just opened a portal to a Hydra Base. At this point, it almost feels like he's just sowing chaos.
name: Unleash Hydra
text: Forced Interrupt: When a side scheme is revealed, place 2 [per_hero] threat here.

name: Hydra Base
text: When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Unleash Hydra A. Forced Response: After you defeat a [[HYDRA]] minion, discard 5 cards from the top of the encounter deck. If any [[HYDRA]] minions were discarded this way, put the first minion discarded into play engaged with you.

flavor: We received an energy signature from Doom consistent with other spells to open a portal, but we cannot detect a portal anywhere on earth...
name: Space Invaders
text: Setup: Choose 1 of the following modular sets and set it aside with this main scheme: â€¢ Band of Badoon â€¢ Space Pirates â€¢ Armies of Titan When Revealed: Shuffle the selected modular set into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

flavor: Signature detected! He's opened a portal outside Earth's atmosphere--it looks like a big one! Battle stations!
name: Space Invaders
text: Forced Interrupt: When a defending ally is defeated, place 1 [per_hero] threat here.

flavor: "Hey guys. The view from Alpha Flight Station isn't looking too promising." â€”Captain Marvel
name: Space Portal
text: Minion attacks deal 1 additional damage to allies. When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Space Invaders A.

flavor: Portal signature picked up at Pym's experimental penitentiary--"The Big House"! There are some serious Masters of Evil in there.
name: Big House Breakout!
text: Setup: Choose 1 of the following modular sets and set it aside with this main scheme: * Sinister Syndicate * Masters of Evil * Wrecking Crew When Revealed: Shuffle the selected modular set into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

flavor: Doom's latest portal has set free and allowed some heavy hitters to return to their normal size. Now these brutes are looking for some retaliation!
name: Big House Breakout!
text: Forced Interrupt: When a [[MASTERS OF EVIL]] or [[BRUTE]] minion enters play, place 1 [per_hero] threat here.

flavor: "An entire prison, shrunk down to miniature size, inmates and all! Who's the cutest little Wrecking Crew? You are!" â€”She-Hulk
name: Big House
text: Minions with the [[MASTERS OF EVIL]] or [[BRUTE]] trait gain retaliate 1.When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Big House Breakout! A.

flavor: Doom's latest portal is giving off some odd readings.
name: Limitless Arsenal
text: Setup: Choose 1 of the following modular set options and set it aside with this main scheme: â€¢ Goblin Gimmicks â€¢ Galactic Artifacts â€¢ Experimental Weapons & Weapon Master When Revealed: Shuffle the selected modular set(s) into the encounter deck. Advance to side B.

flavor: This portal has given Doom access to a limitless selection of dangerous items! We'll need to take care of them, but he'll be none too pleased...
name: Limitless Arsenal
text: Forced Response: After you discard an attachment from Doctor Doom, place 2 [per_hero] threat here.

flavor: "Welcome to the Crossroads of Infinity." â€”Doom
name: Limitless Library
text: When Revealed: Advance to the set-aside scheme Limitless Arsenal A. Forced Interrupt: When an attachment is attached to an enemy, give them a tough status card.

name: Doombot Multiplication
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase, discard the top card of the encounter deck until a Doombot minion is discarded. Reveal that minion. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "I only need one of my cosmically-powered robot duplicates to defeat you." -Doctor Doom
name: Deadlines
text: When Revealed: Discard the top card of the encounter deck until a Doombot minion is discarded and reveal it. Then, if the Doombot Multiplication side scheme is in play, place 2 [per_hero] threat on it.

name: Doombot
text:
Guard. Toughness. Doombot ignores the piercing keyword.
[star] Doombot's ATK is equal to the number of Doombot minions in play.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "Warheads are armed, Master." â€”Doombot
name: Moscow
text: When Revealed: Summon the Disarm: Moscow attachment and put it into play.

name: Disarm: Moscow
text: Attach to Moscow. Victory 1. When Revealed: Summon the Moscow environment and put it into play. Action: Attach a card from your hand here. Forced Interrupt: When 4 cards are attached here with printed costs of 1,1,2, and 3, remove Moscow from the game.

flavor: "You have one hour to accept my rule..." -Doom
name: London
text: When Revealed: Summon the Disarm: London attachment and put it into play.

name: Disarm: London
text: Attach to London. Victory 1. When Revealed: Summon the London environment and put it into play. Action: Attach a card from your hand here. Forced Interrupt: When 4 cards are attached here with printed costs of 1,2,2, and 3, remove London from the game.

flavor: "...or be destroyed. Your move." â€”Doom
name: Washington
text: When Revealed: Summon the Disarm: Washington attachment and put it into play.

name: Disarm: Washington
text: Attach to Washington. Victory 1. When Revealed: Summon the Washington environment and put it into play. Action: Attach a card from your hand here. Forced Interrupt: When 4 cards are attached here with printed costs of 2,2,3, and 3, remove Washington from the game.

flavor: "I trust this lesson will not be lost on the other world leaders."â€”Doctor Doom
name: Global Attack
text: When Revealed: Discard the top card of the encounter deck until an environment or attachment is discarded and reveal it.

flavor: "Dad! Help me!" -Franklin Richards
name: Rescue Franklin!
text: Hinder 3[per_hero]. When Revealed: Place the set-aside Franklin Richards ally faceup beneath this scheme. When this scheme is defeated, the player who defeated it adds Franklin Richards to their hand and removes this scheme from the game. [star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "Franklin, close your eyes and cover your ears! It's just a bad dream, pal!" -Human Torch
name: Demon Guards
text: Guard. Patrol. Retaliate 2.

flavor: "Johnny, watch out! That demon is spitting some kind of caustic material!" â€”Mister Fantastic
name: Demon Enforcer
text: [star] Demon Enforcer's attacks gain piercing.

name: Haazareth Three
text: Forced Interrupt: When Haazareth Three would be defeated, heal all damage from them and place a defeat counter here instead. When there are 3 defeat counters here, remove Haazareth Three from the game.

name: Vibranium Vault
text: This environment can take damage and be defeated. It cannot be healed. When Revealed: Put the set-aside Vibranium Stores environment into play. Forced Response: After step 1, the villain attacks Vibranium Vault. When Defeated: Remove this card from the game and flip Vibranium Stores.

flavor: "This is the most valuable resource in our galaxy. We must protect it."â€”Black Panther
name: Vibranium Stores
text: Setup: Set this card aside. First Player Resource: Generate a [wild] resource. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: "I once possessed the Silver Surfer's power cosmic, and held the Cosmic Cube in my hand, but nothing compares to this." â€”Doctor Doom
name: Vibranium-infused Armor
text: Setup: Set this card aside. Attach to the villain. This card cannot be removed from play. The villain gains stalwart.

flavor: "This vault isn't computer encryption at all. These are alchemical symbols from a blood cult brilliant in the dark arts. An interesting puzzle." â€”Doctor Doom
name: Break In
text: When Revealed: The villain attacks the Vibranium Vault. If no attack was made this way, they activate instead.

flavor: My Lord, the tenth lock is proving very tricky.
name: Vaultbreaker
text: [star] Forced Response: After Vaultbreaker activates, deal 1 damage to the Vibranium Vault environment. If no damage was dealt this way, you and Vaultbreaker are confused.
